	const swiper_type_box = new Swiper(".swiper_type_box", {

      slidesPerView: 4,
    },
		880: {
      slidesPerView: 3.3,
    },
  }
	});

const swiper_separate = new Swiper(".swiper_separate", {
		slidesPerView: 1,
		loop: true,
		autoplay: true,
		pagination: {
			el: '.swiper-pagination-separate',
			clickable: true,
			type: 'bullets'
		},
	});
	
	gsap.to(

	);
	gsap.from(
